side.title: Secure access for your business
side.description: Manage sales, inventory, reports, and users from one responsive point-of-sale workspace.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue managing your store.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start setting up your company and point-of-sale workspace.
register.terms: I agree to the terms and privacy policy.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send reset instructions.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a secure password for your account.

verifyCode.title: Verify your account
verifyCode.subtitle: Enter the verification code sent to your email or phone.
